findings.description: PascalCase class names `SqlResultSet` and `SqlPStatement` appear in the code example in s3 but are absent from hints.
findings.source_evidence: Source Javaコード例: `SqlResultSet resultSet = new SimpleDbTransactionExecutor<SqlResultSet>(...)` and `SqlPStatement prepared = connection.prepareStatement(query);`

findings.description: Class name `BasicStatementFactory` and property name `dbTransactionName` appear in the s4 content (XML config and configuration table respectively) but are absent from hints.
findings.source_evidence: `BasicStatementFactory` appears in the XML config example; `dbTransactionName` is a named property in the SimpleDbTransactionManager configuration table with description about default value behavior.
